description: The Volgograd oil refinery has stopped working after being hit by Ukrainian drones — General Staff This is one of the largest oil refineries in the south of Russia. title: Air defense active
description: Russia is trying to protect Shaheda from interceptor drones with the help of EW. According to Business Insider, the Russians began to install means of electronic warfare in the tail part of drones to interfere with the work of Ukrainian interceptors. The Ministry of Defense of Ukraine confirmed that such modernized drones are already being used during attacks.
description_en: Russia is trying to protect Shaheda from interceptor drones with the help of EW. According to Business Insider, the Russians began to install means of electronic warfare in the tail part of drones to interfere with the work of Ukrainian interceptors. The Ministry of Defense of Ukraine confirmed that such modernized drones are already being used during attacks.
description_uk: русня пытается уберечь «Шахеды» от дронов-перехватчиков с помощью РЭБ По данным Business Insider, россияне начали устанавливать средства радиоэлектронной борьбы в хвостовой части беспилотников, чтобы мешать работе украинских перехватчиков. В Минобороны Украины подтвердили, что такие модернизированные дроны уже применяются во время атак.
